description: A looping agent task where the LLM chooses tools until it has enough observations for a final answer.
task: Create a compact final report. Use one tool per turn. You need observations for all of these items before final_answer: (1) calculate 12345 * 6789, (2) lookup the gpu_policy fact, (3) get text_stats for 'EdgeVisor agent backend', (4) convert 42 celsius to fahrenheit, (5) sort the list [7, 2, 9, 1], and (6) compute sha256 for the text 'agent-loop'. After the six observations, return final_answer with all results in one concise paragraph.
